your agent's memory with reliable backup and restore procedures."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"SQLite Backup"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite databases are single files — backup is as simple as copying:"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Hot backup (SQLite supports concurrent reads)\ncp mnemosyne.db mnemosyne-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).db\n\n# With verification\nsqlite3 mnemosyne.db \".backup to mnemosyne-backup.db\"\nsqlite3 mnemosyne-backup.db \"PRAGMA integrity_check\"\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Automated Backups"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Using Litestream"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Install\nwget https://github.com/benbjohnson/litestream/releases/latest/download/litestream-linux-amd64.deb\nsudo dpkg -i litestream-linux-amd64.deb\n\n# Configure /etc/litestream.yml\naccess-key-id: AKIA...\nsecret-access-key: ...\n\ndbs:\n- path: /data/mnemosyne.db\n  replicas:\n    - url: s3://mybucket/mnemosyne\n      retention: 720h  # 30 days\n      snapshot-interval: 24h\n\n# Start\nsudo systemctl enable litestream\nsudo systemctl start litestream\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Using Cron"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Daily backup to S3\n0 3 * * * sqlite3 /data/mnemosyne.db \".backup to /tmp/mnemosyne-tmp.db\" && aws s3 cp /tmp/mnemosyne-tmp.db s3://backups/mnemosyne-$(date +%Y%m%d).db\n","language":"bash"}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf"],["$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19"],"$L1a"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@1b"]},null,false,"$@1b"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L1c",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$1d",["$L1e"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"oLBkLcipfllBBS_uEwuBd"}

9:["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# From file copy\ncp mnemosyne-backup-20260425.db mnemosyne.db\n\n# From Litestream\nlitestream restore -o mnemosyne.db s3://mybucket/mnemosyne\n\n# Verify\nsqlite3 mnemosyne.db \"PRAGMA integrity_check\"\n","language":"bash"}]
a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Backup Verification"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Always verify backups:"}]
c:["$","$L7",null,{"code":"#!/bin/bash\nBACKUP_FILE=$1\n\n# Check file exists and is valid SQLite\nif ! sqlite3 \"$BACKUP_FILE\" \"PRAGMA integrity_check;\" | grep -q \"ok\"; then\n  echo \"BACKUP FAILED: integrity check failed\"\n  exit 1\nfi\n\n# Check row counts\nWORKING=$(sqlite3 \"$BACKUP_FILE\" \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM working_memory;\")\nEPISODIC=$(sqlite3 \"$BACKUP_FILE\" \"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM episodic_memory;\")\n\necho \"Backup verified: $WORKING working, $EPISODIC episodic\"\n","language":"bash"}]
